title: Harmon of Michigan
writer: Richard Goldstone, Stanley Rauh, Fredric M. Frank
actors: Tom Harmon, Anita Louise, Forest Evashevski
plot: Tom Harmon (ol' # 98 for the Michigan Wolverines, husband of actress Elyse Knox and father of Mark Harmon and Kelly Harmon) took a back seat to no one on the football field (except the Minnesota Gophers) or, later, in the broadcas...
